_comment: Data-driven provider probe configs. Add providers here — no code changes needed. Zero hardcoded limit values. All limit numbers come from user input or live API responses, stored in limit-config.json.

anthropic.notes: OpenClaw tracks Anthropic usage natively. Rolling window limits (not fixed daily resets).

openai.notes: OpenAI does not expose rate limits via API. User must specify during onboarding. Typically rolling 5-hour and per-week windows.

ollama.notes: Local inference. Localhost = unlimited. External host also treated as unlimited unless user specifies otherwise.

http_get.description: HTTP GET with API key. Extract fields from JSON response via dot-paths.

openclaw_status.description: Run `openclaw models status --json` to get usage from OpenClaw's built-in tracking.

local_unlimited.description: Local process. No rate limiting applies.

none.description: No programmatic query. Must be entered by user during onboarding.
